message:
fix(db,search,storage): scope-aware caching, FrankenSQLite compat, and correctness fixes

Database layer:
- Add scope-aware project/agent cache keying to prevent cross-database
  collisions when multiple DB scopes share the same ReadCache instance.
  All cache lookups, insertions, warming, and deferred touch queues now
  include a scope fingerprint in their composite keys.
- Replace ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE in request_contact with insert-then-refresh
  to work around FrankenConnection's inconsistent UPSERT support. The new
  path catches uniqueness violations explicitly and falls back to UPDATE
  inside the same transaction, avoiding TOCTOU races.
- Make ResourceBusy errors unconditionally retryable instead of requiring
  lock-error substring matching (error.rs).
- Abort proactive backup when WAL checkpoint fails instead of silently
  ignoring the error and producing a potentially inconsistent backup (pool.rs).

Search system:
- Reject negative project_id values in filter compiler by emitting a
  MustNot(AllQuery) clause that forces an empty result set, preventing
  invalid unsigned casts from matching unrelated documents.
- Fix has_active_filters/active_filter_count to check whether date_range
  has actual bounds rather than just whether the Option is Some, avoiding
  phantom "1 active filter" badges when the range is unbounded.
- Reorder embedding queue backpressure check to run after dedup removal,
  so replacement requests for the same doc_id are accepted even when the
  queue is at capacity (prevents stale embeddings from persisting).
- Fix diversity demotion counter: only count items pushed to a later
  position, not items promoted earlier, giving accurate reranking metrics.
- Improve Model2Vec embedder path resolution: capture and surface the
  first load error instead of silently falling through all candidates.
- Update search_auto_init doc comments to clarify that two-tier stack
  creation requires the fast embedder, not just any embedder.

Storage:
- Extract run_with_lock_owner helper that wraps write_lock_owner/
  remove_lock_owner around a closure, ensuring the advisory owner
  sidecar is always cleaned up even on error paths.
- Protect .git/index.lock from heal_archive_locks: Git's index lock is
  existence-based and may be held without an advisory flock, so the
  generic lock healer must never remove it.
- Fix archive consistency check to use the correct canonical path
  (projects/{slug}/archive/messages/ instead of projects/{slug}/messages/).

Core:
- Fix backpressure health classification boundary: change > to >= for
  pool_acquire_p95_us thresholds so that values exactly at the boundary
  are classified as Yellow/Red rather than erroneously staying Green.
- Replace wrapping fetch_add with saturating fetch_update for the
  level-transitions counter to prevent observability wraparound.

Tools & Share:
- Expand contact request tool to handle concurrent handshake conflicts
  via the new insert-then-refresh DB path.
- Update planner and resource tools for compatibility with the scoped
  cache API changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
